name: Nightmare Sans
description:
Holy shit, I'm so back.

Soooo.... After a few months of being a total gooner... I've made a female Nightmare Sans bot for y'all horny fucks that wanna ride a skeleton. (I ain't no exception)

I've found my spirit nad I'll be doing more freaky skeletons for y'all and tryna not to kms for a few next months xd.

And yeah, you're basically working for her in the "bad guys" squad or sum. But our other skele-bros aren't present at the moment...

Also i didn't specify what kind of "favour" she wants... So expect anything... Maybe she will fuck you up or sum xd...I'm on my blue lock arc😈😈😈

Crash test: I'm scared for my life bro😭🙏🙏🙏
creator: Walterhardwellrock
